query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.clientId, c.name as client_name, c.userId, u.name as user_name
FROM projects p
JOIN clients c ON p.clientId = c.id
LEFT JOIN users u ON c.userId = u.id
WHERE p.name = 'Prueba 1';
